title: rustc
html:
rustc

File Read

Context: sudo, unprivileged

rustc /path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo 'fn main() { println!("DATA"); }' >/path/to/temp-file
rustc /path/to/temp-file -o /path/to/output-file

Inherit

Context: sudo, unprivileged

rustc --explain E0001
excerpt: rustc File Read Context: sudo, unprivileged rustc /path/to/input-file File Write Context: sudo, unprivileged echo 'fn main() { println!("DATA"); }' >/path/to/temp-file rustc /pa
